global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a focus on travel booking services.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel services easily.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: A simple, circular logo in the top section, featuring a minimalist design that represents the brand.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A rectangular mockup of an app interface, showcasing a clean layout with rounded corners, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Travel booking headline
elements.description: Bold, white text at the center bottom reads 'Book your next trip Hotels + flights in one tap', emphasizing the service offered.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in white, designed to attract immediate action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A clear price tag in white text displaying '€29.99', positioned just above the CTA button.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, travel booking services
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the app screenshot is centered, the headline is at the bottom center, and the CTA is at the very bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NomadLayer, Book your next trip Hotels + flights in one tap, €29.99, Shop now
